entities.name: CARBON STOCK
entities.description: The amount of carbon stored in trees and the forest ecosystem

entities.name: TREES
entities.description: The biological entities whose carbon stock is being assessed

entities.name: FOREST ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: The biological community of trees and associated organisms

entities.name: AIRBORNE REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technique used to reduce uncertainty in upscaling biomass and carbon stock estimates

entities.name: SATELLITE REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technique used to reduce uncertainty in upscaling biomass and carbon stock estimates

entities.name: ALLOMETRIC EQUATIONS
entities.description: Established mathematical equations used to estimate carbon stock from tree measurements

entities.name: TERRESTRIAL LASER SCANNING
entities.description: A technique used to estimate carbon stock at the tree level

entities.name: DESTRUCTIVE MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Direct measurement of carbon stock by harvesting and weighing tree components

entities.name: LOCAL ALLOMETRIC EQUATIONS
entities.description: Allometric equations developed for a specific local region

entities.name: GLOBAL ALLOMETRIC EQUATIONS
entities.description: Allometric equations developed for general application across different regions

entities.name: WOOD DENSITY
entities.description: The mass per unit volume of wood, used to refine carbon stock estimates

entities.name: CARBON CONTENT
entities.description: The proportion of carbon within the wood sample

entities.name: TROPICAL FOREST
entities.description: The specific forest environment where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research took place
